reviews.review_title: For context on why Prims is down
reviews.review_description: So i never got a chance to play prims take (ikr) so im just gonna rate it 5 stars because im guessing it was a great game. Anyways, from what i heard, Prims Take is down FOREVER because as some of you know, prim dated cloud (cloudluminous, creator of Cloud’s gorilla horror great game its servers are coming back up soon), and practically groomed him. From one of MasonPlayz’s videos, prim encouraged cloud to start master****ing (iykyk) and told him to do alot of other bad stuff, and also cloud said that it wasn’t anyone, (gdi, gold, etc) except prim that took down both the games servers.
Could we  like forgive prim ik he did bad stuff but he is a changed person i saw him talking on tiktok nd stuff and he changed also he liked developing this game and everyone liked the game
primmings/groomings did something terrible
I loved this game but now that it got shut down and all the drama there’s not much people on it /:
